steps.t: Waldo Rumble saw a strange figure lurking near the Party Tree during the early morning hours, but it fled up the Hill toward Bag End when he approache…
A small scroll has fallen by the path near Bag End. It seems to be very similar to the cards hanging on the Party Tree.
Lobelia Sackville-Baggins has called you over, clearly intending to give you a piece of her mind.
Waldo Rumble is by the Party Tree, waiting for some clue to the identity of the suspicious figure he saw.
You have in your possession a mysterious scroll that may contain a clue to learning the identity of the mysterious party-planner who festooned the Par…

You found Ebrulf Sackville by a pile of scrolls north-west of Overhill, in the Bindbole Wood. Is he responsible for the shenanigans that have so preoc…
You have learned the identity of the mastermind behind the cards hanging from the Party Tree and should return now to Waldo Rumble.
